name: Sherrod Brown
subject: This is how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | In the nine years since _Citizens United_ , cash-filled special interests have had no trouble spending obscene amounts of money to buy influence. But Peter -- huge checks aren't what matters. Activism matters. On this team, [**we organize one average online contribution of $26 at a time.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdf1/4462dc26/8fb66aab/201ee800/1320997794/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMTI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190126pm?refcode=sbe190126pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26") We fight for workers and their families. We advocate for economic policies that support and reward work over wealth. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190126pm?refcode=sbe190126pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26"), we make a difference. And as we start off this new year, we need to be as engaged as ever. We're so close to the $26,000 we need by midnight to get back on track, but we're running out of time. [**Peter, consider this a personal request -- if you can, match our $26 contribution today.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdf1/4462dc26/8fb66aab/201ee800/1320997794/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTkwMTI2cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190126pm?refcode=sbe190126pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183&amount=26") With immense gratitude, Sherrod

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Before I officially kick off our campaign for president --
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
In just a few moments, I’m heading to the rally in my hometown of Oakland to formally kick off our campaign for president. I wanted to share some themes from the speech I’ll deliver today. But first, let me take this moment to share a genuine message of thanks. I’m grateful to have you by my side as we take on this historic challenge. None of this could be possible without you and the tens of thousands of other people across the country who are stepping up to join me in this fight. I’m so proud to be a daughter of Oakland. My parents met as graduate students at UC Berkeley, where they were active in the civil rights movement. They were born half a world apart from each other. My father, Donald, came from Jamaica to study economics. My mother, Shyamala, came from India to study the science of fighting disease. My parents came here in pursuit of more than just knowledge. Like so many others, they came in pursuit of a dream -- for themselves, for me, and for my sister Maya. We were raised by a community with a deep belief in the promise of our country -- and a deep understanding of the parts of that promise that still remain unfulfilled. We were taught to see a world beyond just ourselves. To be conscious and compassionate about the struggles of ALL people. We were raised to believe public service is noble and the fight for justice is everyone’s responsibility. That, in many ways, formed my life. **That’s why I’m running for president: I love our country, and I feel a deep sense of responsibility to stand up and fight for the best of who we are and what our country can be.** I’m ready to fight for the values we as Americans hold sacred and dear. And I’m ready to fight because we deserve leadership that will focus on the needs of the people of this country, not their own self-interests. Together, we will put forth a vision of the future of our country in which everyone can see themselves. **And I believe ours is a winning fight.** This won’t be easy -- but nothing worth fighting for ever is. We face tough days and hard work ahead. But this is our America -- and it’s up to each and every one of us to fight for our future. The people in power are no match for the power of The People. Let’s do this. — Kamala Harris | | **Tune in LIVE starting at 12:30 p.m. PST / 3:30 p.m. EST on[Facebook](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/8458?t=1&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe), [Twitter](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/8459?t=2&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe), [Instagram](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/8460?t=3&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe), or [YouTube](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/8461?t=4&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe).**

---

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Chip in $10 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190127-oakland?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190127-KDH-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&t=5&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190127-oakland?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190127-KDH-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=6&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe)
---
| | [Chip in $50 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190127-oakland?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190127-KDH-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=7&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe)
---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190127-oakland?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=em190127-KDH-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=8&akid=1942%2E5755789%2EyfQOHe)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: A Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976977/2ae112ef/1659bb9f/357a3b49/2875150103/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976977/2ae112ef/1659bb9f/357a3b49/2875150103/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
We need a moonshot. We're running out of time to save our planet from catastrophic climate change. We must act now to preserve and protect the only home we have - not just for us, but for our children and their children. That's why we must commit to a green economy in the next 10 years.
We can create new, clean jobs that protect our planet and our economy, but we have to stop running scared from the coal and fossil fuel industries. For the sake of our kids and future, let's stand up to them.
**That 's why we need a Green New Deal.** And if you want to see Congress take bold action to save our planet and transform our economy, I need you to add your name and join our fight right now:
****[Click here to take action for a Green New Deal and fight to save our planet.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/green-new-deal?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=jtk2700-ja-non-abel-nd")****
A Green New Deal means stopping big polluters from dumping harmful chemicals into our air and our oceans, lakes and rivers. It means ensuring that access to clean air and clean water is a right for every community, not a privilege. It means actually investing in green energy and building up infrastructure to meet the impacts of climate change head on.
**If you believe that clean air and water are a fundamental right for everyone, if you believe we need to take bold action to combat the impacts of climate change, and if you believe we all share a moral obligation to preserve our planet for future generations, I 'm counting on you to stand with me today:**
****[Join me in the fight for a Green New Deal. Together, we will transform our economy, combat the growing threat of climate change and protect the health and safety of our families and future generations.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/s/green-new-deal?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&source=jtk2700-ja-non-abel-nd")****
Thank you for speaking out on an issue that couldn't be more urgent. This fight won't be easy, but nothing worth doing ever is.
Kirsten
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976977/2ae112ef/1659bb9f/357a3b4b/2875150103/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
